terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro: Bareq is an electronic intermediary platform connecting customers with cleaning companies in Libya. By using the application, you agree to these Terms & Conditions.

sections.title: 1. Nature of the Application
paragraphs: The application acts solely as an electronic intermediary connecting users with cleaning companies.
The company does not employ, manage, or directly supervise cleaning workers.
Cleaning companies bear full responsibility for workers including employment, training, salaries, and insurance if applicable.

sections.title: 2. User Requirements
paragraphs: Users must be 18 years or older.
Users must provide accurate information during registration.
The application may not be used for illegal activities or activities violating Libyan public laws and morals.

sections.title: 3. Booking Services
paragraphs: Cleaning companies may accept or reject bookings depending on availability and operational conditions.

sections.title: 4. Pricing and Payments
paragraphs: Prices are determined by cleaning companies, not by the application.
The application may add service fees if applicable.
Payments are made through available methods inside the application.
All prices are displayed in Libyan Dinars (LYD).

sections.title: 5. Cancellation and Modifications
paragraphs: Users may cancel bookings before a specified time.
Late cancellations may incur fees.
Bookings may be modified depending on provider availability.

sections.title: 6. Legal Responsibility
paragraphs: The application is not responsible for service quality, worker behavior, or damages or losses resulting from services.
Full responsibility lies with the cleaning company.
Disputes shall be resolved directly between the user and the cleaning company.

sections.title: 7. Obligations of Cleaning Companies
bullets: Cleaning companies must comply with Libyan labor laws.
Ensure workers are legally eligible to work.
Assume responsibility for violations or damages.

sections.title: 8. User Obligations
bullets: Avoid requesting illegal or unauthorized services.

sections.title: 9. Privacy and Data Protection
paragraphs: User data is collected solely for service provision.
Data may only be shared with cleaning companies or official authorities if legally required.
The application will protect user data according to Libyan regulations.

sections.title: 10. Disclaimer
bullets: Services are provided "as is" without guarantees.
The application does not guarantee uninterrupted service.
The application is not responsible for technical failures or outages.

sections.title: 11. Account Suspension
paragraphs: The company may suspend accounts for violating terms or abuse or misuse.
Users may delete their accounts at any time.

sections.title: 12. Modifications
paragraphs: The company may update Terms & Conditions at any time.
Users will be notified through the application.

sections.title: 13. Governing Law
paragraphs: These Terms are governed by Libyan law.
Libyan courts shall have jurisdiction over disputes.

sections.title: 14. Contact
paragraphs: Users may contact the application through email or customer support inside the app.

sections.title: 15. Acceptance
paragraphs: By using the application, users agree to all Terms & Conditions.

terms.acceptance: By using Bareq, you agree to these Terms & Conditions.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Bareq is committed to protecting user privacy and keeping information confidential in accordance with applicable laws in Libya.

sections.title: 1. Introduction
paragraphs: By using the application, you agree to this Privacy Policy.

sections.title: 2. Use of Information
bullets: Communicating with users and service providers
Sending notifications related to bookings or updates

sections.title: 3. Sharing Information
paragraphs: User data is not sold or rented to third parties.
Data may only be shared with registered cleaning companies to fulfill services, or competent authorities when legally required.

sections.title: 4. Data Retention
paragraphs: Data is retained as long as necessary to provide services or as required by law.
Users may request account deletion according to in-app policies.

sections.title: 6. Policy Changes
paragraphs: The application may update this policy at any time. Users may be notified through the app or available channels.

sections.title: 7. Governing Law
paragraphs: This policy is governed by the laws of Libya. Libyan courts have jurisdiction over related disputes.

sections.title: 8. Contact
paragraphs: For privacy inquiries, contact us through channels available in the application.

sections.title: 9. Consent
paragraphs: By using the application, you acknowledge your agreement to this Privacy Policy.

privacy.acceptance: By using Bareq, you agree to this Privacy Policy.
